Allweiler (Circor) ·Pumps & Valves

Allweiler Progressive Cavity & Centrifugal Pumps

Spare parts for Allweiler progressing-cavity (SN/SNP/SEP) and NB/NT centrifugal pumps.

Parts catalog
How to use this list: Part numbers match OEM service manuals. Use the request button below to ask about availability and pricing. Include the part number, quantity, and delivery port.
PROGRESSIVE CAVITY PUMPS – SN / SNP / SEP SERIES 4
Part NumberDescription
00110585Stator – Allweiler SEP 50.1 (pos. 402 per drawing)
00110150Stator – Allweiler SNP/SEP 25.1 (pos. 402 per drawing)
Pos. 401 / SEP 50.1Rotor – Allweiler SEP 50.1 (pos. 401 per drawing)
Pos. 401 / SNP 25.1Rotor – Allweiler SNP 25.1 (pos. 401 per drawing)
CENTRIFUGAL PUMPS – NB / NT SERIES 12
Part NumberDescription
Pos. 102.01Volute Casing
Pos. 108.01Stage Casing
Pos. 161Housing Cover
Pos. 171.01Impeller
Pos. 230.01Impeller (1st stage – multi-stage pumps)
Pos. 230.02Impeller (2nd stage)
Pos. 220Stub Shaft
Pos. 903.01 / 903.02 / 903.04Screw Plug (various)
Pos. 914.01 / 914.02 / 914.06 / 914.10Cheese Head Screw (various)
Pos. 920.01 / 920.03Nut (various)
–contact CIRCOR / MPCC–Mechanical Seal (NB series – shaft size determines seal no.)
–contact CIRCOR / Trisun–Mechanical Seal (NTT thermal oil series – contact CIRCOR)
ALLWEILER COMMON PUMP SERIES ON BOARD SHIPS 7
Part NumberDescription
–model only–NB 25-160 / NB 25-200 / NB 40-160 / NB 80-160 (general service centrifugal)
–model only–NT 100-315 / NT 150-315 / NT 200-400 / NT 250-250 (hot water / thermal centrifugal)
–model only–NIM 65-250 / NIM 80-200 / NIM 200-315 (motor-integrated centrifugal)
–model only–NSL 300-425-502 (large in-line centrifugal)
–model only–CLT 50-315 (chemical centrifugal)
–model only–LV 50/5 / LV 50/6 (side channel pump)
–model only–SLS 440 ER (submersible screw pump)

We source and deliver maritime and industrial spare parts globally. Engine components, pumps, navigation equipment, sensors, electrical, and auxiliary equipment. Emergency timelines and obsolete items handled.
